examples: Objective: To explore the morphological characteristics of the microvasculature in cerebellar dentate nuclei of infants.
Chromogranin a (CHGA) regulates the storage and release of catecholamines and may have direct actions on the microvasculature.
Objective To explore the morphological characteristics of the microvasculature of cerebellar dentate nuclei and medullae around nuclei of infants.
